title: Sponsoring someone's visa :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Sponsoring someone's visa
Find out who can sponsor a visa applicant, the sponsorship process and what the responsibilities of a sponsor are.
- Who can sponsor a visa applicant Not everyone can sponsor someone to come to New Zealand. Find out which people and organisations we can accept as sponsors.

## Who can sponsor a visa applicant
Not everyone can sponsor someone to come to New Zealand. Find out which people and organisations we can accept as sponsors.
- Sponsorship process for a visa If an individual, organisation or supporting partner wants to sponsor you, they must meet our requirements for an acceptable sponsor and provide evidence by completing a sponsorship form.

## Sponsorship process for a visa
If an individual, organisation or supporting partner wants to sponsor you, they must meet our requirements for an acceptable sponsor and provide evidence by completing a sponsorship form.
- Your responsibilities as a sponsor If you sponsor a visa holder, you are responsible for them while they are in New Zealand on that visa.

## Your responsibilities as a sponsor
If you sponsor a visa holder, you are responsible for them while they are in New Zealand on that visa.
